# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  parameters:
    appServiceName: string
    sqlServerName: string
    storageAccountName: string
    location: string
    appServicePlanName: string

  variables:
    appServiceApiVersion: '2018-11-01'
    sqlDatabaseApiVersion: '2014-12-01-preview'
    storageAccountApiVersion: '2019-04-01'

  resources:
    resources:
      - name: appServicePlan
        type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
        apiVersion: ${{ variables.appServiceApiVersion }}
        location: ${{ parameters.location }}
        properties:
          sku: Y1
          tier: Standard
          osType: linux
          name: ${{ parameters.appServicePlanName }}

      - name: appService
        type: Microsoft.Web/sites
        apiVersion: ${{ variables.appServiceApiVersion }}
        location: ${{ parameters.location }}
        properties:
          serverFarmId: /subscriptions/${{ subscription().subscriptionId }}/resourceGroups/${{ resourceGroup().name }}/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/${{ parameters.appServicePlanName }}
          siteConfig:
            alwaysOn: true
            appSettings:
              - name: AzureWebJobsDashboardConnectionString
                value: ${{ references.sqlDatabase.connectionString }}
              - name: AzureWebJobsStorage
                value: ${{ references.storageAccount.primaryEndpoints.blobStore.uri }}
          name: ${{ parameters.appServiceName }}

      - name: sqlDatabase
        type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
        apiVersion: ${{ variables.sqlDatabaseApiVersion }}
        location: ${{ parameters.location }}
        properties:
          administratorLogin: azureadmin
          administratorLoginPassword: '<YourStrongPassword>'
        resources:
          - name: db
            type: databases
            apiVersion: ${{ variables.sqlDatabaseApiVersion }}
            properties:
              collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
              creationDate: $(UTCNow)
              maxSizeBytes: 4GB
              requestedServiceObjectiveName: S0
              serviceObjectiveId: Basic

      - name: storageAccount
        type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
        apiVersion: ${{ variables.storageAccountApiVersion }}
        location: ${{ parameters.location }}
        properties:
          accountKind: StorageV2
        sku:
          name: Standard_LRS
